---
title: "XOR Training Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    self-contained: true
---

```{ojs}
// ── Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
data_raw = await FileAttachment("dashboard.csv").csv({ typed: true })
metadata = await FileAttachment("metadata.json").json()

// Derived constants
all_iters  = [...new Set(data_raw.map(d => d.iteration))].sort((a,b) => a - b)
n_iter     = all_iters.at(-1)
run_labels = metadata.map(m => m.label)
```

```{ojs}
// ── Run selector ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof selected_labels = Inputs.checkbox(run_labels, {
  label:  "Training runs (select up to 3)",
  value:  [run_labels[0]]
})

// Clamp to 3 selections — warn if over
{
  if (selected_labels.length > 3) {
    return html`<p style="color:#f0883e;font-family:monospace;font-size:12px">
      ⚠ Maximum 3 runs — only the first 3 will be shown.
    </p>`
  }
}

// Effective selection: at most 3
sel_labels = selected_labels.slice(0, 3)

// Map labels back to repeat numbers for filtering
sel_repeats = sel_labels.map(l => metadata.find(m => m.label === l).repeat)
```

```{ojs}
// ── Playback controls ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof playing = Inputs.toggle({ label: "▶ Play", value: false })

viewof speed = Inputs.range([1, 60], {
  label: "Speed (iter/s)",
  step:  1,
  value: 20
})

viewof trail_len = Inputs.range([5, 200], {
  label: "Trail length",
  step:  5,
  value: 50
})

viewof slider_iter = Inputs.range([0, n_iter], {
  label: "Iteration",
  step:  1,
  value: 0
})
```

```{ojs}
// ── Animation clock ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
clock = {
  let iter  = slider_iter;
  let last  = null;
  let frame;

  const ticker = (resolve) => {
    const step = (ts) => {
      if (!playing) { iter = slider_iter; last = null; resolve(iter); }
      else {
        if (last === null) last = ts;
        const elapsed = ts - last;
        const ms_per  = 1000 / speed;
        if (elapsed >= ms_per) {
          const steps = Math.floor(elapsed / ms_per);
          iter  = (iter + steps) > n_iter ? 0 : iter + steps;
          last  = ts;
          resolve(iter);
        }
      }
      frame = requestAnimationFrame(step);
    };
    frame = requestAnimationFrame(step);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(frame);
  };

  return Generators.observe(ticker);
}

eff_iter = playing ? clock : slider_iter
```

```{ojs}
// ── Colour palette — one colour per run slot ──────────────────────────────────
COLOURS = ["#f0883e", "#58a6ff", "#3fb950"]

// Filter data to selected repeats
function run_data(repeat) {
  return data_raw.filter(d => d.repeat === repeat)
}

// Trail: last trail_len iterations up to eff_iter for a given repeat
function trail_data(repeat) {
  return data_raw.filter(d =>
    d.repeat   === repeat &&
    d.iteration <= eff_iter &&
    d.iteration >= eff_iter - trail_len
  )
}

// Current point for a given repeat
function current_point(repeat) {
  // nearest iteration at or below eff_iter
  const pts = data_raw
    .filter(d => d.repeat === repeat && d.iteration <= eff_iter)
    .sort((a,b) => b.iteration - a.iteration)
  return pts[0] ?? null
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Plot 1: Loss vs iteration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
loss_plot = {
  const traces = sel_repeats.flatMap((rep, i) => {
    const d    = run_data(rep)
    const col  = COLOURS[i]
    const name = sel_labels[i]

    // Full loss line (dimmed)
    const line = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
      x: d.map(r => r.iteration),
      y: d.map(r => r.loss),
      line: { color: col, width: 1.5 },
      opacity: 0.35,
      name,
      showlegend: true,
    }

    // Highlighted portion up to eff_iter
    const active = d.filter(r => r.iteration <= eff_iter)
    const active_line = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
      x: active.map(r => r.iteration),
      y: active.map(r => r.loss),
      line: { color: col, width: 2 },
      showlegend: false,
      hoverinfo: "skip",
    }

    // Current point marker
    const pt = current_point(rep)
    const marker = pt ? {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: [pt.iteration], y: [pt.loss],
      marker: { color: col, size: 8, line: { color: "#fff", width: 1.5 } },
      showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: `iter %{x}<br>loss %{y:.4f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    } : null

    return marker ? [line, active_line, marker] : [line, active_line]
  })

  // Vertical rule at current iteration
  const rule = {
    type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
    x: [eff_iter, eff_iter],
    y: [0, Math.max(...data_raw.map(d => d.loss))],
    line: { color: "#7d8590", width: 1, dash: "dot" },
    showlegend: false, hoverinfo: "skip",
  }

  const layout = {
    paper_bgcolor: "#0d1117",
    plot_bgcolor:  "#161b22",
    font:  { family: "JetBrains Mono, monospace", size: 11, color: "#e6edf3" },
    title: { text: "Loss vs iteration", font: { size: 13 }, x: 0.04 },
    xaxis: { title: "Iteration", gridcolor: "#30363d", zerolinecolor: "#30363d" },
    yaxis: { title: "Loss",      gridcolor: "#30363d", zerolinecolor: "#30363d" },
    legend: { bgcolor: "#0d1117", bordercolor: "#30363d", borderwidth: 1 },
    margin: { t: 40, r: 20, b: 50, l: 60 },
    height: 320,
  }

  return {traces: [...traces, rule], layout}
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Plot 2: Parameter space (param_0 × param_1) ───────────────────────────────
param_plot = {
  const traces = sel_repeats.flatMap((rep, i) => {
    const col  = COLOURS[i]
    const name = sel_labels[i]
    const trl  = trail_data(rep)
    const pt   = current_point(rep)

    // Trail line
    const trail_line = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
      x: trl.map(r => r.param_0),
      y: trl.map(r => r.param_1),
      line: { color: col, width: 1.5 },
      opacity: 0.45,
      showlegend: false,
      hoverinfo: "skip",
    }

    // Trail points coloured by loss
    const trail_pts = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: trl.map(r => r.param_0),
      y: trl.map(r => r.param_1),
      marker: {
        color:     trl.map(r => r.loss),
        colorscale: "YlOrRd",
        reversescale: true,
        size: 4,
        opacity: 0.6,
        showscale: i === 0,   // only show colorbar for first run
        colorbar: i === 0 ? {
          title: "Loss", thickness: 12, len: 0.6,
          tickfont: { size: 10 },
        } : undefined,
      },
      name,
      showlegend: true,
      hovertemplate: `param_0 %{x:.3f}<br>param_1 %{y:.3f}<br>loss %{marker.color:.4f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    }

    // Current point
    const marker = pt ? {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: [pt.param_0], y: [pt.param_1],
      marker: { color: col, size: 10, symbol: "circle",
                line: { color: "#fff", width: 1.5 } },
      showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: `iter ${eff_iter}<br>param_0 %{x:.3f}<br>param_1 %{y:.3f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    } : null

    return marker ? [trail_line, trail_pts, marker] : [trail_line, trail_pts]
  })

  // Axis ranges — fixed across all runs to keep stable
  const all_p0   = data_raw.map(d => d.param_0)
  const all_p1   = data_raw.map(d => d.param_1)
  const pad      = 0.3
  const p0_range = [Math.min(...all_p0) - pad, Math.max(...all_p0) + pad]
  const p1_range = [Math.min(...all_p1) - pad, Math.max(...all_p1) + pad]

  const layout = {
    paper_bgcolor: "#0d1117",
    plot_bgcolor:  "#161b22",
    font:  { family: "JetBrains Mono, monospace", size: 11, color: "#e6edf3" },
    title: { text: "Parameter space — w₁ × w₂ (neuron 1)", font: { size: 13 }, x: 0.04 },
    xaxis: { title: "param_0  (w₁)", gridcolor: "#30363d",
             zerolinecolor: "#30363d", range: p0_range },
    yaxis: { title: "param_1  (w₂)", gridcolor: "#30363d",
             zerolinecolor: "#30363d", range: p1_range, scaleanchor: "x" },
    legend: { bgcolor: "#0d1117", bordercolor: "#30363d", borderwidth: 1 },
    margin: { t: 40, r: 60, b: 50, l: 60 },
    height: 420,
  }

  return { traces, layout }
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Render ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Plotly is loaded via CDN in the body below.
// Each plot is rendered into a div via the invalidation-safe pattern.

Plot1 = {
  const div = document.createElement("div")
  Plotly.newPlot(div, loss_plot.traces, loss_plot.layout,
    { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false })
  return div
}

Plot2 = {
  const div = document.createElement("div")
  Plotly.newPlot(div, param_plot.traces, param_plot.layout,
    { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false })
  return div
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Status bar ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
html`<div style="
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #7d8590;
  margin: 8px 0 16px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 32px;
">
  <span>iteration <strong style="color:#e6edf3">${eff_iter}</strong> / ${n_iter}</span>
  ${sel_repeats.map((rep, i) => {
    const pt = current_point(rep)
    return pt
      ? html`<span style="color:${COLOURS[i]}">${sel_labels[i].split(" (")[0]}
               — loss <strong>${pt.loss.toFixed(4)}</strong></span>`
      : ""
  })}
</div>`
```

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.32.0.min.js"></script>
```
